description: This dataset is used to create the Cemetery Fees & Charges webpage (found at: https://www.winnipeg.ca/CemeteryFeesCharges). The webpage is an easy-to-read version of the City of Winnipeg Cemeteries Branch Fees & Charges schedule. If there is a discrepancy between any of the fees & charges contained on this web page, and those found in the City of Winnipeg Cemeteries Branch Fees & Charges schedule, the Fees & Charges schedule will prevail. Users can access the schedule here: https://www.winnipeg.
